articles.description: Narayanpur Collector Namrata Jain said that a water supply system had been set up in the village under the Jal Jeevan Mission

articles.title: Watch: Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch shares emotional video of reuniting with dog Sadie
articles.description: NASA astronaut Christina Koch has reunited with her dog after returning from the Artemis II mission, with a video of the emotional moment gaining attention online and highlighting the personal side of space travel.

articles.title: T.N. election 2026: Vaniyambadi constituency residents complain about delay in construction of ROB, illegal sand mining on Palar riverbed
articles.description: They said that indiscriminate sand mining has affected the depth of the riverbed and recharge of groundwater

articles.title: Three Tankers Clear Hormuz as Other Ships Abandon Passage
articles.description: Three tankers — the first to attempt a transit of the Strait of Hormuz since the US announced a blockade — have successfully cleared the waterway. After sailing near the Iranian coast, the trio have now emerged into open waters.

dailyNews.description: The Social Security Administration follows a fixed Wednesday schedule for monthly payments, supporting over 75 million Americans.

dailyNews.description: Companies across sectors have resumed IPO roadshows despite Middle East tensions, signalling pent-up demand in the pipeline. dailyNews.title: Iran Blockade Sets Up a Test of Which Side Can Endure More Pain
dailyNews.description: President Trump is trying to choke off the country’s lifeline with a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. But the Iranians are betting that his tolerance for political pain is limited.

dailyNews.title: To Open the Strait of Hormuz, Trump Wants to Blockade Iran. Experts Are Skeptical.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s announcement of a U.S. blockade was his latest effort to pressure Iran to negotiate after direct talks over the weekend did not yield an agreement.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Many Popes Before Leo Have Been Entangled in Politics. Here Are 5 of Them.
dailyNews.description: Leo XIV, under fire from President Trump, has joined predecessors like Francis and John Paul II in confronting political issues.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Erratic Behavior and Extreme Comments Revive Mental Health Debate
dailyNews.description: As the president threatens to wipe out Iran and attacks the pope, even some former allies and advisers are questioning whether he has grown increasingly unbalanced, describing him as “lunatic” and “clearly insane.”

dailyNews.title: Pride Flag Can Fly at Stonewall After Trump Administration Reversal
dailyNews.description: The settlement ends a symbolic attack on the L.G.B.T.Q. rights movement and deals a blow to the administration’s assault on diversity initiatives.

dailyNews.title: Meet Péter Magyar, the man replacing Viktor Orbán as Hungary's prime minister
dailyNews.description: President Trump has lost his biggest cheerleader in Europe, but he may find common ground with his new counterpart, Péter Magyar.

dailyNews.title: DoorDasher delivers to White House, joins Trump in talking to press
dailyNews.description: President Trump invited DoorDash delivery worker Sharon Simmons to talk about his "no tax on tips" policy.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices jump after Trump announces U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Neil Irwin, chief economic correspondent at Axios, joins CBS News 24/7 to break down the jump in oil prices after President Trump announced the U.S. would blockade Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump reacts to collapsed Iran talks and Pope Leo comments
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed reporters at the White House on Monday, taking questions about Iran and his criticisms of Pope Leo XIV. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has the latest on President Trump's comments at an event on his policy to tax tips.
